decks.description: A balanced creature-focused deck with light removal and bounce effects. Relies on small to medium creatures with one powerful legend and utility spells for value.
This deck focuses on equipping creatures with weapons and utilizing combat-focused instants to win through efficient sword mastery and dueling abilities.
A creature-focused deck with multiple flyers and evasive creatures, supported by enchantments that boost your board presence.
Rebel-focused creatures with versatile instant responses and artifact support for mid-game combat flexibility.
A creature-focused deck centered around warrior creatures with combat bonuses from enchantments and artifacts. Emphasizes tactical, aggressive gameplay with strong warrior synergies.
A balanced deck with creature-focused gameplay, featuring Hei Bai as a key spirit card with versatile instants for flexibility and disruption.
A creature-heavy deck centered on Hei Bai with a mix of utility creatures and a sorcery for removal, offering flexibility in play patterns.
An evasive flying-focused deck with small creatures and flying support. Features creatures with flying abilities paired with instants and artifacts that enable aerial superiority.
A flying-themed deck with airborne creatures and spell support. Combines flying creatures with instants and sorceries to control the skies.
An aggressive creature-focused deck with fliers and combat tricks that punish opponents and leverage small efficient creatures.
A creature-heavy strategy deck with warrior synergies and combat-oriented enchantments that leverages efficient creatures and tactical combat tricks.
Creature-focused deck with a mix of rebels and warriors, featuring evasion and combat tricks to win through creatures.
Creature-heavy deck with combat-focused instants and artifacts, designed to win through efficient creatures and tactical tricks.
Control-focused deck with removal and bounce spells, featuring a mix of creatures and instant-speed answers to manage the board while building with waterbending themes.
A control-focused deck that draws cards and gains knowledge through card advantage mechanics, featuring creatures that reward library interactions and instant-speed tricks.

A versatile blue deck with diverse creatures and spellcasting, featuring utility spells like Frantic Search and card advantage tools. It adapts to various situations with a mix of combat and removal options.
Spirit-focused deck with creature-heavy strategy featuring multiple spirit cards and utility instants for control and card advantage.
A creature-focused deck with aquatic and sea creatures that provides evasion and utility through instants and enchantments.

cards.title: Tui and La, Moon and Ocean

decks.description: A creature-focused deck with flying creatures and card draw effects that generate value through combat and spellcasting.
An instant-heavy tempo deck with flying creatures and efficient blue spells to control the game while dealing damage through aerial threats.
A flying-focused deck with evasive creatures like Flying Dolphin-Fish and Teo, Spirited Glider that dominate the air while utilizing blue spells for utility.
A flying-heavy tempo deck with evasive creatures and blue spell tricks to protect and bounce creatures while attacking from the air.
A creature-focused waterbending deck with instant removal and control spells to disrupt opponents while building board presence.
A creature-heavy blue deck that uses instants and control spells to protect creatures and manage the board while developing a steady offense.
A spell-heavy blue deck focused on card draw and board control with interactive instants and enchantments.
A blue deck with modest creature presence that uses instants and enchantments for control and utility effects.
A control-focused deck with disruptive creatures and removal spells that punishes opponents for their choices while establishing board presence through efficient creatures.
Creature-focused removal deck with efficient blockers and targeted removal spells to dismantle opponents.
A creature-focused deck built around political manipulation and control effects. Features advisors and scheming creatures that work to disrupt opponents' plans through removal and cutthroat tactics.
A creature-focused black deck with a mix of spirits and evasive creatures. Uses targeted removal and sorceries to control the board while developing threats.
An artifact-focused deck that leverages artifacts and artifact synergies alongside creatures and removal spells to control the game.
Bounty Hunter focuses on cheap creatures with some discard and removal, featuring a strong creature-based gameplan with some enchantment support for added value.
Bounty Hunter focuses on small efficient creatures with direct removal and enchantments that generate value from creature interactions and sacrifices.
Creature-focused deck with hunters and flying creatures, supplemented by removal sorceries for dealing with threats.
Creature-based hunting deck with hunters and removal spells, featuring some enchantment-based creature control.
A creature-heavy deck with removal spells and board pressure, using mid-sized creatures to establish dominance.
A creature-focused deck with instant-speed answers and targeted removal to control the board while developing threats.
Fast aggro deck with cheap threats and instant-speed removal, applying constant pressure with creatures and disruption.
Efficient creature-based tempo deck that dominates the early game with evasive threats and flexible interaction spells.
Avatar Roku leads a high-impact creature deck with powerful firebending magic, focused on strong individual threats and direct damage spells.
A creature-light, spell-heavy deck focused on efficient burn spells and removal to deal direct damage while controlling the board with a small suite of utility creatures.
An aggressive red deck with creatures that deal direct damage and combat tricks to burn down opponents quickly.
A creature-heavy deck with a mix of sorceries that focuses on powerful firebending effects and card advantage through hand disruption and reunion effects.
A creature-focused deck with enchantments and artifacts that builds around nomadic musicians and dancers, featuring both direct damage and evasive creatures.
A creature-focused aggressive deck with removal spells and burn, featuring various Fire Nation characters and direct damage to finish opponents.
A creature-heavy deck with combat-focused instants and versatile warriors, emphasizing board presence with direct damage support.
Creature-focused deck with large aggressive creatures and some spells to support them in combat.
Creature-heavy aggressive deck with powerful creatures backed up by combat tricks and card advantage spells.
A scrappy rebel deck focused on small efficient creatures and combat tricks to overwhelm opponents with freedom fighters and rebel characters.
An aggressive rebel deck with strong creature synergies and combat-focused instants that leverages defectors and freedom fighters to attack consistently.
Aggressive creature-heavy deck with direct damage instants and sorceries, focusing on red's fast burn strategy.
Fast red aggro deck with strong creatures and instant-speed trick support, designed for quick damage output.
A hybrid-based deck with balanced creature threats and utility spells, featuring Avatar Kyoshi and her warrior allies backed by defensive enchantments and land destruction.
A creature-focused deck with emphasis on earthbending warriors and elemental creatures, combining efficient small creatures with enchantment support for board presence.
Animal-focused aggro deck with diverse creatures from the Avatar universe's zoo, supplemented by creature-enhancing instants and artifacts for aggressive board presence.
A creature-focused deck with utility spells and enchantments that provides defensive and resilience effects.
A creature-focused deck with animal companions and support spells, featuring the unfortunate Cabbage Merchant whose cabbages meet their doom.
A creature-focused deck with Toph and Earth Kingdom warriors that aims to control the ground with enchantments and utility spells.
A mid-range creature deck featuring Toph and earthbenders that combines solid ground effects with ramp spells for consistent board presence.
This deck focuses on creature combat with a fighting theme, featuring wrestlers and combat-heavy creatures that use instants like Hog-Monkey Rampage to dominate the battlefield.
A creature-focused deck featuring wrestlers and powerful creatures with instant-speed combat tricks to enable aggressive plays and control the board through fighting mechanics.
A creature-focused deck with hybrid cards emphasizing small efficient creatures and utility artifacts, playing out creatures and support spells.
A creature-heavy green deck with multiple strong creatures and hybrid cards, focused on building a board presence with synergistic creatures.
A spell-heavy deck focused on learning and growth with combat training creatures and removal spells.
A creature-focused deck with combat training elements and enchantment support, featuring a mix of instants and sorceries.
A multicolor temple-focused deck that combines creature synergies with enchantment-based shrines to build board presence and utility.
